reviews.comment:
Recomiendo cargar aquí porque luego no hay nada por un largo trecho. Tienen sombras para descansar y un kiosko con de todo

(Translated by Google)
I recommend charging here because there's nothing for a long stretch afterward. They have shady areas to rest and a kiosk with everything you need.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1eTg3YTFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Malisima atención del despachante. Mal educado, irrespetuoso, rezongando. Problemas de señal en ese lugar, wifi de la estación  flojisimo.

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service from the dispatcher. Rude, disrespectful, and grumbling. There were signal problems in that location, and the station's Wi-Fi was extremely weak.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1M3JHRGNREAE

reviews.comment:
Se puede arreglar mejor la parte de mesas, poner más y restaurar   aquellas que están rotas, por este lugar pasan cientos de turistas

(Translated by Google)
The tables could be better fixed, put more and restore the broken ones, hundreds of tourists pass through this place
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1NXFfZ2J3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es la única YPF entre San Luis y San Juan, dependiendo del combustible que tengan y para donde vallan, es recomendable que carguen y llenen el tanque.

(Translated by Google)
It is the only YPF between San Luis and San Juan, so depending on the fuel they have and where they are going, it is recommended that they fill up their tank.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10917902775629832707/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1dXZHaGVREAE
